# QIK-VRT Copilot instructions

Before generating or modifying project content, read `AI`, parse `AI_CONTEXT.json`, and follow its `required_read_order`.

Repository evidence is authoritative over chat or model memory. Preserve provenance, effect boundaries, tests, hashes, and the explicit licensing split: freely available architecture does not automatically license the concrete implementation as open source. Treat symmetric canonicality as verified only for byte-equivalent declared scope.
